text: Indicative offer from Fattal Hotel Group at £22 per share. Follows strategic review and formal sale process.
Trading update - trading in line with expectations. FY 2026 outlook maintained.
Shareholders overwhelmingly approve scheme. Completion expected by Q1 2027.
New addition: Apollo makes conditional proposal at 885p plus 16.1p dividend. Discussions are ongoing.
Company announces it has received "credible interest" from potential acquirers, discussions ongoing.
